<!-- 
  Welcome! This template is for your INTRO PR only.
  Your PR title must be exactly: "My First Open Source Contribution"
  (The title is already pre-filled above  -  please don't change it!)
-->

## What I'm adding

I'm adding my name, GitHub username, and LinkedIn profile link to the `CONTRIBUTORS.md` file.

## Checklist

<!-- Go through each item and check it off when done (change [ ] to [x]) -->

- [ ] I've read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) guide
- [ ] I've forked the repository and cloned my fork locally
- [ ] I've created a new branch (e.g., `intro/your-github-username`)
- [ ] I've added my entry to `CONTRIBUTORS.md` in the correct format
- [ ] My commit message includes `Signed-off-by: My Name <my@email.com>` (DCO sign-off)
- [ ] The PR title is exactly `My First Open Source Contribution`

## My entry in CONTRIBUTORS.md

<!-- Copy and paste exactly what you added to CONTRIBUTORS.md here so it's easy to review -->

```
| Your Name | @your-github-username | [LinkedIn](your-linkedin-url) |
```

## Anything you want to say?

<!-- Optional: How did you find this project? First time contributing to open source? 
     Any feedback on the contributing guide? We love hearing from new contributors. -->
